note: Post-rehab full evaluation on the discrete-attention (hard_attention) checkpoint. Supersedes the pre-rehab soft-attention summaries, which were computed on a non-functional model (recurrent collapsed to uniform attention, lost to baseline).

stage3.note: robust across seeds and the default + 0.25 reduced-shaping checkpoint family

stage6b.disposition: bounded positive: controller state beats capacity-matched observation on positive recall for all four gated signals, but revisit/allocation_error have marginally negative accuracy advantage, so the stricter capacity audit does not pass. Provisional, not robust.

stage4b.disposition: Not supported in the base config (Stage 4B causal feedback path disabled). Learned-self-model emergence is studied separately (roadmap Phase 3).

reduced_shaping.disposition: Bounded resilience at weight 0.25 (acc clearly above static); complete zero-shaping collapses to ~static accuracy, so complete zero-shaping is NOT supported (known weakness). The current min_accuracy=0.15 threshold is too lenient and is flagged for calibration.
